title: Learning Log Entry
description: Defines the structure of individual learning entries stored in learnings/<item-id>.md frontmatter. The root learning-log.md is an index; per-phase entries live in the learnings/ subfolder.

item_id.description: The roadmap item this learning entry relates to.

change_id.description: The OpenSpec change-id that was implemented for this item.

phase.description: Which execution phase produced this learning.

decisions.description: Key decisions made during this item's execution.

blockers.description: Blockers encountered and how they were resolved.

deviations.description: Where implementation deviated from the original plan.

recommendations.description: Suggestions for pending roadmap items based on this item's experience.

vendor_notes.description: Vendor-specific observations (performance, capability gaps, cost). MUST NOT contain credentials, tokens, or raw prompts.
